intro.en: My work connects psychological theory with testable AI systems, with a focus on machine psychology, persona simulation, and human–AI alignment.
intro.zh: 我的研究连接心理理论与可检验的人工智能系统，关注机器心理学、人格模拟与人机心智对齐。

intro.en: Peer-reviewed papers, preprints, and working papers. Citation counts refresh weekly from Google Scholar.
intro.zh: 同行评议论文、预印本与工作论文。引用量每周从 Google Scholar 自动更新。

intro.en: Education, funded projects, affiliations, teaching, talks, and academic service.
intro.zh: 教育背景、科研项目、机构经历、教学、报告与学术服务。

intro.en: Selected research awards, competition prizes, scholarships, and academic recognition.
intro.zh: 研究奖项、竞赛获奖、奖学金与学术荣誉。

intro.en: Selected publications, awards, talks, and research milestones.
intro.zh: 精选论文、获奖、报告与研究节点。
